## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy and performance updates.](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is improving: 89 published articles, over 1,000 clicks (best week), 57,000 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [9 tier-one integration pages added to backend; tier-two pages in progress](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [YouTube video integration for blog posts to be manually curated, prioritizing top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [New CTAs for Strapi conference and enterprise sales to be implemented](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Exploring workflows for repurposing video content into articles and curating content from multiple sources](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [89 published articles](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Best week: over 1,000 clicks, rebounding from previous slump](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Impressions back on track at 57,000](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Goal: double current figures as soon as possible](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Non-branded keywords column added to performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [9 tier-one integration pages added to backend](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Theo to review before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Tier-two pages now in progress](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [350 clicks for integration pages last week](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Paul manually created 10stack integration page (to be excluded from tier-two generation)](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

### Blog Content Enhancements

  - [YouTube video and image columns added to tracking sheet](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Golzar to own YouTube video integration process:](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
      - [Prioritize top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Use only Strapi-produced videos (v4 and v5 content)](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Identify gaps in video content for potential new video creation](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Discussed possibility of creating short summary videos for well-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Considering repurposing YouTube videos into written content](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)

### CTA Updates

  - [New Strapi conference CTA to be implemented (conference website now ready)](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Updated "Contact Sales" CTA for enterprise-tagged content](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Agreed to potentially use two CTAs on some articles (event + existing CTA)](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

### Content Curation and Generation

  - [Exploring workflows to use curated content (podcasts, YouTube videos, blog posts) as input for new article generation](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Paul suggested looking into Google's NotebookLM for multi-source content generation](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Golzar to curate YouTube videos for blog post integration, prioritizing top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Andrej to implement new CTAs for Strapi conference and enterprise sales](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Explore and potentially implement workflow for repurposing video content into articles](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [Investigate Google's NotebookLM for multi-source content generation](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Continue work on tier-two integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Develop strategy for using curated content as input for new article generation](https://fathom.video/share/6NHJYQzGfdzLey-DULHCUmM7u1_zq-N-?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
